name: zuar-portal-mcp-server
description: Create and manage Zuar Portal HTML blocks with Claude.
long_description: An MCP server that lets Claude build Zuar Portal (zPortal) HTML blocks for you. It can list, read, create, update, and delete HTML blocks via the Portal REST API, discover datasources and saved queries, and preview sample rows so blocks get wired to real data. Bundled authoring guidance (block structure, currentBlock data access, the amCharts 5 loader pattern) helps Claude produce correct two-field blocks. Only HTML blocks are created or modified.

prompts.name: create_zportal_block
prompts.description: Guided workflow to build a correct zPortal HTML block.
prompts.text: Build a Zuar Portal HTML block for: ${arguments.goal}. Datasource hint: ${arguments.datasource_hint}. Read the zportal://guide resources, discover the datasource, then create the block.

portal_url.title: Portal URL
portal_url.description: Base URL of your Zuar Portal, e.g. https://your-portal.zuarbase.net

portal_api_key.title: Portal API Key
portal_api_key.description: API key from zPortal Admin -> Auth -> API Keys.

portal_user_id.title: Portal User ID
portal_user_id.description: Your user UUID from zPortal Admin -> Users (copy from the URL).
